evidenceSnippetOriginal: Unless explicitly authorised, using AI to create assessed work may be treated as an offence such as contract cheating under Imperial's Plagiarism, Academic Integrity & Exam Offences regulations. Familiarise yourself with Imperial's Academic Misconduct Policy for rules on appropriate AI usage.
evidenceLocator: Library Services - Generative AI guidance: 'Appropriate academic use of generative AI' section
